title: Current table in 25-26 season
moto: Only For People Who Are In Love With Ball®
multered: Results in the past time in the 25-26 season
hirek_leirasa_01: Liverpool: According to Romano, there is currently no plan to dismiss the manager
hirek_leirasa_02: Manchester United will only sign a striker in January if Šeško’s injury proves to be serious

hir_osszefoglalo_01: According to Romano, the club currently has no intention of changing the manager, despite a poor start to the season.
hir_osszefoglalo_02: Romano reports that Manchester United will only sign a new striker if Benjamin Šeško’s injury turns out to be a long-term issue.
hir_osszefoglalo_03: Romano confirmed that the Anfield club have offered Ibrahima Konaté a new contract and are confident of reaching an agreement.
hir_osszefoglalo_04: According to Romano, Arsenal are preparing a new offer for a targeted midfielder, with negotiations becoming increasingly active.
hir_osszefoglalo_05: Based on Romano’s information, Chelsea could soon announce their new defender, with personal terms already agreed with the player.
hir_osszefoglalo_06: Romano reports that Tottenham have already started talks to sign a winger in the winter transfer window and are optimistic about reaching an agreement.
hir_osszefoglalo_07: According to Romano, Newcastle are determined to sign a new striker and will continue negotiations until an agreement is reached.
hir_osszefoglalo_08: Romano says that Barcelona have made significant progress in talks over a new contract for a key defender and are close to a final agreement.
hir_osszefoglalo_09: According to Romano, Real Madrid are in advanced talks with one of their biggest talents over a contract extension and could reach an agreement soon.
hir_osszefoglalo_10: Romano reported that Bayern Munich are working on signing a new attacker, with several candidates being considered.
hir_osszefoglalo_11: According to Romano’s information, Inter are close to reaching an agreement for the arrival of a midfielder who could join the team as early as January.
hir_osszefoglalo_12: Romano reports that Juventus have concluded negotiations to sign a new defender, with the announcement now only a matter of time.
hir_osszefoglalo_13: According to Romano’s report, PSG aim to stabilise the squad and are therefore in talks with several key players over contract extensions.
aboutText: FotStats is a modern football platform that combines real-time statistics, fan experience, and professional depth. With us, you don't just see who won, but also how – from how many corners, in which minute, and how many fans lost their voices in the process. We created this site because we’ve also experienced having to open 12 tabs for a single piece of data during a match. From now on, one click is enough – and yes, it fits on the screen right next to your coffee. We don’t promise your favorite team will win, but we do promise you'll find every bit of data here – even how many times the goalkeeper kicked the ball onto the bench. FotStats: statistics, humor, football. Three in one.
